summary: Full backend + frontend smoke/integration testing for Bloommama. 17/17 pytest backend tests pass (health, auth login/me/invalid/missing, bookings public create, list-requires-auth, list-sorted-desc, patch valid/invalid/404, delete auth/404/success). Frontend: home loads with all required testids (hero, 5 service-card-*, why-card-0, benefit-0, price-* + grand-package, booking-form, contact-phone/email/wechat-qr, disclaimer, footer-wechat-qr, nav-*); language toggle EN<->中文 confirmed (hero text changes); public booking form submission shows booking-success and persists in admin list; /admin redirects unauth users to /admin/login; admin login lands on /admin and renders bookings; status select changes to 'confirmed'; filter tabs (All/Pending/Confirmed/...) work; delete removes a row (2->1); logout returns to /admin/login. No mocks, no critical issues.

minor.issue: Returns 200 OK on create instead of 201 Created (convention nit; tests adjusted).
CORS allow_origins is bound to a single FRONTEND_URL env var; if FRONTEND_URL is unset, falls back to localhost:3000. Works for deployed preview but brittle if env changes.
Hard-coded list cap of 1000 (to_list(1000)). No pagination; fine for MVP, document for future.
Uses find_one_and_update then re-fetches doc (double round-trip). Minor perf nit, can use ReturnDocument.AFTER.

issues: Browser-native <select> used for status (acceptable, but inconsistent with shadcn styling on rest of site). Browser-native date/time pickers in booking form (acceptable for MVP).

action_items: OPTIONAL: Return HTTP 201 from POST /api/bookings for REST correctness.
OPTIONAL: Use ReturnDocument.AFTER in PATCH /api/bookings/{id} to avoid an extra read.
OPTIONAL: Replace native <select>/date/time pickers with shadcn equivalents for consistent design.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS in server.py allows a single origin from FRONTEND_URL env var with allow_credentials=True. Correct shape, but ensure FRONTEND_URL always matches the deployed frontend; otherwise browser will block requests.

Auth cookie is set with secure=True, samesite='none' — appropriate for cross-site preview deployments; will only flow over HTTPS. Bearer token via localStorage is also used by frontend; both paths verified working.
seed_admin correctly upserts the admin password when env value differs (matches playbook).
BookingForm.jsx posts directly via axios — no loading indicator besides button text; error path is wired with booking-error testid. Good.
AdminDashboard performs delete via window.confirm(); accepted by test dialog handler. Consider a shadcn AlertDialog for nicer UX.
test_credentials: Admin: bloommama66@gmail.com / Bloom@2026 (loaded from /app/memory/test_credentials.md, matches backend .env seed).
seed_data_creation: Created two test bookings via the public POST /api/bookings flow during frontend test (one via UI 'TEST_PWUser' + one earlier 'Test Mom'). Backend pytest also created+deleted one TEST_Alice booking. Frontend delete flow removed one of the two test bookings. Remaining test booking(s) may still exist in DB and can be cleaned up by admin UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and is fully self-contained (uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Admin testids in AdminDashboard use shape status-{id}, delete-{id}, booking-{id}, booking-toggle-{id}, expand-{id}, admin-refresh, admin-logout. AdminLogin uses admin-email, admin-password, admin-login-submit. BookingForm uses booking-name/phone/email/wechat/service/package/date/time/suburb/stage/notes/submit/success/new/error. Home uses hero-*, service-card-*, why-card-*, benefit-*, price-*, grand-package, contact-phone/email/wechat-qr, disclaimer. Lang toggle: lang-toggle. Nav: nav-services/nav-pricing/nav-booking/nav-contact. footer-wechat-qr present.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All required features per the review request work end-to-end.
